name: Ali Gohar
message: Ali Gohar & Company (founded in 1950) - are a comprehensive and distribution company that provides services in the pharmaceutical and medical sector. Ali Gohar corporate office is located in 1-b I.i.chundrigar Rd, Karachi, Sindh, 74000, Pakistan and has 375 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 51.9 GB
